name: =?utf-8?Q?Courtland=20Sykes?=
subject: The War Thomas Jefferson Warned Us About
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COURTLAND SYKES FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
|
Today we celebrate the life of Thomas Jefferson as he dedicated his life to God and the greatest experiment created by mankind: the American Constitutional Republic.

**In the words of Jefferson: **
_"Can the liberties of a nation be thought secure when we have removed their only firm basis, a conviction in the minds of the people that these liberties are the gift from God? That they are not to be violated but with His wrath? I tremble for my country when I reflect that God is just; that His Justice cannot sleep forever."_
**Now more than ever, we need God's justice. **

We have a Deep State operating illegally in the United States. Deep State's agenda? To strip us of our liberties -- bit by bit, day by day.

Former CIA director John Brennan is one senior member; still operating against our Constitutional Republic and our duly elected President, Donald Trump. Brennan, even though he is no longer in a visible leadership position, influences decisions from behind the scenes with career government workers who want to keep our President from being successful.

Deep State is anti-Trump and includes establishment republicans who don't want to change course from their autocratic agenda.

As a former member of the Diplomatic and Intelligence communities, I know where the Deep State targets are, and know how to restore our Constitutional Republic as the next Senator from Missouri.

**_It is well known amongst my former colleagues in the intelligence community_ that John Brennan is a practicing muslim. **

Not only is John attempting to overthrow our Constitutional Republic with an illegal Deep State, but he has personally converted to a violent religion hell-bent on controlling the world through its caliphate.
---
| [ ](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=dbeaa2a531&e=9da9b0ca31)
---
| It is up to us. We can lose this country if we don't fight. Liberty is given by God. Pray for God's wrath. Pray for God's justice. Support candidates who will fight, alongside President Trump, against John Brennan's deep state.

Jefferson's prescience is stark. We cannot fear our own government -- we hold the power and we must remember that. Now more than ever.

Currently, the CIA, and other Deep State elements, operate without congressional oversight. This is an inflection point in the United States where we must elect true patriots who not only will fight against the Deep State but know exactly how.

Let us stand up and fight.

[Stand with me.](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=797597c273&e=9da9b0ca31)

Courtland Sykes

name: Debrief via Team Kaine
subject: What Tom said
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
You play a critical part in the midterms this year. You're a part of Team Kaine, and Team Kaine needs to set the tone for Virginia and the entire country:
| | Derek, Tom Perez emailed you (yes, you!) about the future of the Democratic Party.

Why? Because you play a critical part in the midterms this year. **You 're a part of Team Kaine, and Team Kaine needs to set the tone for Virginia and the entire country:**

[We need to elect fighters.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13f1/3e0906/643348f6/3e34271a/857845428/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=20180605_1_FR_TEAM_TP-Followup-1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+We+need+to+elect+fighters&utm_campaign=20180605_1_FR_TEAM_TP-followup-1&source=20180605_1_FR_TEAM_TP-followup-1")
Without Tim to be a voice of reason, right-wing chaos could continue in Washington.
[Chip in $5 to re-elect Tim to the Senate >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13f1/3e0906/643348f6/3e342719/857845428/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=20180605_1_FR_TEAM_TP-Followup-1&amount=5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Chip+in+5+to+reelect+Tim+to+the+Senatenb&utm_campaign=20180605_1_FR_TEAM_TP-followup-1&source=20180605_1_FR_TEAM_TP-followup-1")

[We need to compete everywhere.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13f1/3e0906/643348f6/3e342718/857845428/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=20180605_1_FR_TEAM_TP-Followup-1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+We+need+to+compete+everywhere&utm_campaign=20180605_1_FR_TEAM_TP-followup-1&source=20180605_1_FR_TEAM_TP-followup-1")
Our program will reach every corner of Virginia.
[Chip in $25 to go directly to our ground program >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13f1/3e0906/643348f6/3e34271f/857845428/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=20180605_1_FR_TEAM_TP-Followup-1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+Chip+in+25+to+go+directly+to+our+ground+&utm_campaign=20180605_1_FR_TEAM_TP-followup-1&source=20180605_1_FR_TEAM_TP-followup-1")

[We can define our party.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13f1/3e0906/643348f6/3e34271e/857845428/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=20180605_1_FR_TEAM_TP-Followup-1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+We+can+define+our+party&utm_campaign=20180605_1_FR_TEAM_TP-followup-1&source=20180605_1_FR_TEAM_TP-followup-1")
Our opponents are as extreme as it gets - and they're going after our values.
[Chip in $50 to help us make ads that defend our values >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13f1/3e0906/643348f6/3e34271d/857845428/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=20180605_1_FR_TEAM_TP-Followup-1&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+Chip+in+50+to+help+us+make+ads+that+defe&utm_campaign=20180605_1_FR_TEAM_TP-followup-1&source=20180605_1_FR_TEAM_TP-followup-1")

[We can't take anything for granted.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13f1/3e0906/643348f6/3e34271c/857845428/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=20180605_1_FR_TEAM_TP-Followup-1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+We+canrsquot+take+anything+for+granted&utm_campaign=20180605_1_FR_TEAM_TP-followup-1&source=20180605_1_FR_TEAM_TP-followup-1")
Not thinking this race is close is the first step in losing it.
[Chip in $100 to make a major investment in this race >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13f1/3e0906/643348f6/3e342713/857845428/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=20180605_1_FR_TEAM_TP-Followup-1&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+Chip+in+100+to+make+a+major+investment+i&utm_campaign=20180605_1_FR_TEAM_TP-followup-1&source=20180605_1_FR_TEAM_TP-followup-1")

We use every dollar donated by grassroots supporters like you and direct it to the voter outreach and messaging that makes our campaign strong.

**Any donation you make will be treated with care and will thoughtfully go towards the neighborhood teams, the media, and the data that will make 2018 a triumph for Virginians and for Democrats.**

Use this link to donate any amount you feel comfortable with ->

[https://secure.timkaine.com/Donate](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13f1/3e0906/643348f6/3e342712/857845428/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=20180605_1_FR_TEAM_TP-Followup-1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=9+-+httpssecuretimkainecomDonate&utm_campaign=20180605_1_FR_TEAM_TP-followup-1&source=20180605_1_FR_TEAM_TP-followup-1")

Thanks for supporting our campaign to re-elect Tim!

_Team Kaine_

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13f1/3e0906/643348f6/3e342715/857845428/VEsHAQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=14+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20180605_1_FR_TEAM_TP-followup-1&source=20180605_1_FR_TEAM_TP-followup-1")

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Time for the Playoffs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
I’ve said from the beginning that, although this is my campaign, this is OUR movement. And **this primary night victory isn’t just my victory—it belongs to ALL OF US** , and I want to properly thank everyone who has been a part of this.
I’d like to especially thank my staff for helping to build this incredible campaign.
I’d also like to thank everyone who has been a part of this journey. Whether it was knocking on doors, making phone calls, donating time or money to our campaign, or sharing our posts on social media—THANK YOU.
And lastly, thank you to my family—for all of the invaluable support they’ve given me!
To steal a cliché from baseball—the regular season is over, and now it’s time for the playoffs. Steve King is an eight-term incumbent, but we’re ready to change that. [**_If you’re ready to help make it happen, please donate to this movement today._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1348198/7377190/1177723694?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjIxNGJlZS00ODY5LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uvA0uFnoFE8xGagfFlHo7Zc0bMcuB7QJslcwDNZQgzM=)
I am convinced that this race is going to come down to the wire in November. I am going to tell you what I used to tell my baseball teammates when I would be a starter on the mound: I will put us in a position to win, but in order to win, I am going to need help. **I can’t beat Steve King, but WE can.**
Together, let’s do something really special. Let’s build a 4th district, an Iowa, and an America that STANDS TALL FOR ALL.

Thank you,
J.D. Scholten
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1348199/7377191/1177723694?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjIxNGJlZS00ODY5LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uvA0uFnoFE8xGagfFlHo7Zc0bMcuB7QJslcwDNZQgzM=)

Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
Scholten4Iowa
P.O. Box 3531
Sioux City, IA 51102
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/be18e487-4769-e811-80c2-00155dc337c6/9f214bee-4869-e811-80c2-00155dc337c6?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjIxNGJlZS00ODY5LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uvA0uFnoFE8xGagfFlHo7Zc0bMcuB7QJslcwDNZQgzM=&id=109918160&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

I can’t beat Steve King, but WE can. Together, let’s do something really special. Let’s build a 4th district, an Iowa, and an America that STANDS TALL FOR ALL. Thank you, J.D. Scholten = Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee Scholten4Iowa P.O. name: Matt Brown
subject: Only 4 more days to vote early for Corey!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stewart for Senate, Inc
body:
| [](http://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/?e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=absentee6_5&n=1)
---
Peter -- Next Tuesday is election day, but _**you can vote today**_ at your local registrar's office. If you think there's a chance you cannot make it on Tuesday, June 12th, go to your local registrar's office and vote for Corey Stewart before the _**deadline this Saturday, June 9th, at 5 PM.**_
* To find your local registrar's office click [here.](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fvote.elections.virginia.gov%2FVoterInformation%2FPublicContactLookup&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=absentee6_5&n=2)
* Don't know where you're registered? click [here](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fvote.elections.virginia.gov%2FVoterInformation&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=absentee6_5&n=3) to find out.

How to vote at the registrar's office.
* _You must show an acceptable form of photo ID. To view a complete list of acceptable IDs, please click[here.](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.elections.virginia.gov%2Fcasting-a-ballot%2Fin-person-voting%2Findex.html&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=absentee6_5&n=4) _
* _After completing the application, you will be allowed to vote absentee in-person using a voting machine in the registrar’s office. Accessible equipment and/or curbside voting is available upon request.___

It's time to replace Kaine with a Senator who will fight for the President's Agenda in the U.S. Senate by electing Corey Stewart on June 12th. Corey is the only candidate that can defeat Tim Kaine, winning 5 times to lead a blue county in Northern Virginia while leading as a conservative. Corey Stewart has cut taxes and spending, 30% lower than any other Northern Virginia county. _You can trust Corey to keep his promises because he has the record to back it up. Corey's record:_
* Prince William is ranked #1 for jobs in Virginia,
* has a triple-AAA bond rating, less than 2% of counties in the country have achieved this,
* taxes are 30% lower than anywhere else in Northern Virginia.
* Prince William was the first in Virginia to:
* eliminate the fee to obtain a concealed carry permit.
* put retired police officers in our schools to protect our children.
* to require local law enforcement to turn criminal illegal aliens over to ICE for deportation.

**_A vote for Stewart on June 12th is a vote for Donald Trump's America First Agenda._** Here are some acceptable reasons to vote early in Virginia:
* You are working and commuting to/from home for 11 or more hours between 6:00 AM and 7:00 PM on Election Day
* You are a student attending college outside of where you live
* You will be out of town on Election Day
* For a full list of reasons for voting absentee, **[please visit the Virginia Department of Elections site here.](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.elections.virginia.gov%2Fcasting-a-ballot%2Fabsentee-voting%2F&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=absentee6_5&n=5)**

********This fight is going to be tough, but if you stand with Corey today, you'll help elect the best candidate to take on Tim Kaine in November!

Thanks,

Matt Brown
Campaign Manager
[](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.anedot.com%2Fcoreystewart%2Fc835d1a969020126d8d9f&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=absentee6_5&n=6)

| | Paid for by Stewart for Senate, Inc.____
---
Stewart for Senate · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=absentee6_5&n=7).

body:

Friend,

I save writing to you for truly special occasions.

And we've got an extra special one coming up... We'll soon be celebrating the birthday of Vice President Pence, who also happens to be the love of my life.

I want to give Mike a card signed by all of our most enthusiastic supporters. **[Will you add your name by 9:00 PM tonight, Friend?](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c876b7d80589faf206b0ac2c51f0541b6585f3d7fe893ae1c5501fefebb7164bd11bddeec0f2dab1e87dc2d638aad63f50c68f508e0de532)**

You are our constant motivation to keep fighting the good fight for America.

_And I know it would mean the world to my husband if you signed his birthday card as a reminder who he 's truly fighting for._

**[Please join me in celebrating Mike's birthday by signing his card by 9:00 PM tonight.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=c876b7d80589faf279e63559430a98645a49973a5554028009fe03d3886f682b9cd84f2a7389d68cc214b2a830aa39d0f3a66b00525919db)**

subject: 🚒 Fighting for our firefighters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/bbmDXjHgrt75As95aTQ4zXFIl4UAgHiZjrl4ItzCjGo=/6D2HVXp2ONSe2yMl_Y7UDKAkuMqyDgAtlVGrcC_SBRA=) Friends and Neighbors -- Our firefighters have some of the most important jobs in our community. Every day, these brave individuals put their lives on the line to protect us. And yet, they ask for so very little in return. What many people may not realize is that the Chief Financial Officer is also the State Fire Marshall -- a role that at its core has firefighters' backs. **So I am both humbled and honored to have the endorsement of the International Association of Fire Fighters (IAFF) in this campaign.** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/bbmDXjHgrt75As95aTQ4zXFIl4UAgHiZjrl4ItzCjGo=/vz_ZL6ygAHN89STIUt3azfupFGnBfT-v5LdlzyAWSI4=?am=3&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) [Help Me Fight for our Firefighters. Chip in $3.](https://act.myngp.com/el/bbmDXjHgrt75As95aTQ4zXFIl4UAgHiZjrl4ItzCjGo=/vz_ZL6ygAHN89STIUt3azfupFGnBfT-v5LdlzyAWSI4=?am=3&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) These real life heroes risk their lives everyday, and as Florida's next CFO I will not only do everything in my power as fire marshal and trustee to the Florida Retirement System, to ensure that they have the tools they need to do their job and the piece of mind to know that their retirement is secure, but also be an important check and balance in the cabinet making sure that your tax dollars are being spent the way you were told they had been spent and advocating for a new more innovative economy for all Floridians. But I have to get to Tallahassee first. **And I can 't get there without your help**. [**Can you contribute $3 or more today to help me fight for our brave firefighters and other first responders?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/bbmDXjHgrt75As95aTQ4zXFIl4UAgHiZjrl4ItzCjGo=/vz_ZL6ygAHN89STIUt3azfupFGnBfT-v5LdlzyAWSI4=?am=3&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) Thank you for all of your support, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER

name: The White House
subject: A celebration of America
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=033bc8cfce845c50968bc3fba8f33f891f788bbe17b2e90ddda000c39e34556d67e24f37af1dceba0526d896cd0e7e16942a0418cecbb8a4) The White House • June 6, 2018
## The Day Ahead
| • | President Donald J. Trump will sign the [VA MISSION Act of 2018](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=033bc8cfce845c50a6ecb03b39ec8f57e51507e92e43fcfe95999760abb3f52f159a4b54db8e33deeeb73a3c8fe21cc1734b33e9e90b6c51), which will transform the VA healthcare system and provide more choices for America's veterans. [Watch live at 12:15 p.m. ET. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=033bc8cfce845c50ad4991ce8ef44237fb3c049cb9caf89cc0ad1dc18dd66670874c8aaeb6fc687f9853d0c43a5234ffedf660fa9e26e5c0)
---|---
• | First Lady Melania Trump will join the President for a hurricane preparedness briefing at the FEMA headquarters. Hurricane season officially began on June 1.

---
|

## A celebration of America
**Yesterday, President Trump addressed a crowd** gathered on the White House South Lawn. "It is my great pleasure to welcome everyone to the White House for this patriotic celebration. A beautiful, beautiful day, and a beautiful celebration," the President said.
**"We love our country. We respect our flag**. And we always proudly stand for the National Anthem. We always will stand for the National Anthem," he continued. "So we stand together for freedom. We stand together for patriotism. And we proudly stand for our glorious Nation under God."
**The ceremony included performances of the Star-Spangled Banner** and God Bless America by the United States Marine Band and the United States Army Chorus. With the full Philadelphia Eagles football team unable to come to the White House for a commemoration of their Super Bowl championship, President Trump welcomed Eagles fans and others for a different kind of celebration.
[Watch President Trump lead a celebration of America at the White House.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=033bc8cfce845c50d3365c769a4080bc03531687d40fd427796cf0f2eb648dc149ea2109593ee213b17ac153caf60afbea6f45129c95f236)

---
|

## 500 days fighting the scourge of drugs
**As the Administration reached its 500-day milestone** this week, the White House is looking back at a few of the most consequential issues that President Trump has faced early in his term. Among the most severe crises he has confronted is America's opioid epidemic.
**The President launched a nationwide effort** to combat the opioid crisis that concentrated on three things: reducing demand, cutting off illicit drug supplies, and expanding treatment opportunities. The omnibus spending bill President Trump signed earlier this year dedicates nearly $4 billion to meeting the epidemic head-on.
**The U.S. Border Patrol continues working to stop drug supplies** before they reach our communities, seizing more pounds of fentanyl--a highly addictive and frequently trafficked opioid--so far in Fiscal Year 2018 than in all of FY 2017. The Department of Justice secured its first-ever indictments against Chinese fentanyl manufacturers who target their drugs to American citizens.
[Five hundred days in, President Trump continues to make our communities safer.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=033bc8cfce845c50cf6101166ee01129d7564a623d63ac39fce03b89ba71c87a45698205c4cb8b3e76cf90937308b9025ab36d4eac4de900)
**Go deeper** : [How we will win the war on opioids](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=033bc8cfce845c50242e45c23bd6302ce05735e8cadab0430db9dccec55feb33227eb0e657862fe5ca528d436c749c987e3f40986e9cb255)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by D. Myles Cullen
**President Donald J. Trump participates in a Celebration of America** | June 5, 2018

clean_body: Your 1600 Daily: | | The White House • June 6, 2018 The Day Ahead | • | President Donald J. Trump will sign the , which will transform the VA healthcare system and provide more choices for America's veterans. ---|--- • | First Lady Melania Trump will join the President for a hurricane preparedness briefing at the FEMA headquarters. Hurricane season officially began on June 1. | A celebration of America Yesterday, President Trump addressed a crowd gathered on the White House South Lawn. "It is my great pleasure to welcome everyone to the White House for this patriotic celebration. A beautiful, beautiful day, and a beautiful celebration," the President said. "We love our country. We respect our flag. And we always proudly stand for the National Anthem. We always will stand for the National Anthem," he continued. "So we stand together for freedom. We stand together for patriotism. And we proudly stand for our glorious Nation under God." The ceremony included performances of the Star-Spangled Banner and God Bless America by the United States Marine Band and the United States Army Chorus. With the full Philadelphia Eagles football team unable to come to the White House for a commemoration of their Super Bowl championship, President Trump welcomed Eagles fans and others for a different kind of celebration. | 500 days fighting the scourge of drugs As the Administration reached its 500-day milestone this week, the White House is looking back at a few of the most consequential issues that President Trump has faced early in his term. Among the most severe crises he has confronted is America's opioid epidemic. The President launched a nationwide effort to combat the opioid crisis that concentrated on three things: reducing demand, cutting off illicit drug supplies, and expanding treatment opportunities. The omnibus spending bill President Trump signed earlier this year dedicates nearly $4 billion to meeting the epidemic head-on. The U.S. Border Patrol continues working to stop drug supplies before they reach our communities, seizing more pounds of fentanyl--a highly addictive and frequently trafficked opioid--so far in Fiscal Year 2018 than in all of FY 2017. The Department of Justice secured its first-ever indictments against Chinese fentanyl manufacturers who target their drugs to American citizens. Go deeper : | Photo of the Day Official White House Photo by D. Myles Cullen President Donald J. Trump participates in a Celebration of America | June 5, 2018 | |

body:
Hi,

This weekend Abigail and I joined Amy as she accepted the Democratic party's nomination in Rochester.

Her team put together this short video about Amy's work -- and it's too good not to share it with all of you.

[](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ckYEdpC0Lc1DhcMoSCkAjc862rj5Mj3n)
---

You've had Amy's back, supported her, and helped her make a difference and the achievements in this video are your achievements too.

I'm so proud of all Amy has done for Minnesota. She's working hard every day to strengthen our economy, lower prescription drug costs, combat climate change, and protect our democracy.

[**Will you contribute to Amy 's campaign today so she can continue getting things done for all Minnesotans?**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=vnHyue9qCPR2%2BL7q%2Flmvf8862rj5Mj3n)

name: Bredesen 2018
subject: Help keep this campaign about you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE
body:
#
Hey Peter \--
Phil Bredesen’s priority in this Senate race is keeping our message centered on getting things done for Tennessee. That means we need to know what issues matter most to voters (like you), which is why in a few moments I’m going to ask you to participate in a brief survey.
Nowadays, most campaigns are feeding voters poll-tested soundbites and consultant-crafted slogans focused on creating division among groups of voters. It’s no wonder partisan rancor and chaos dominate our politics.
Our campaign is different -- we want our message to be focused on bringing people together and changing the way Washington works. So when we send surveys like this one, we’re asking you to help inform that message.
It’ll only take a couple minutes to complete this survey. Our first question is below, and you can finish the rest after selecting your answer.
**If you had to pick one issue, which would you say matters most to you and your family right now? Click on a choice below to record your answer:**

name: Heather Coil, AustinPetersen.com
subject: What is Hawley afraid of?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Hey Friend, A lot has happened in the past two weeks on the campaign. A LOT. But we cannot take the pressure off of Josh Hawley. He still REFUSES to debate Austin Petersen face to face. Articles continue to roll out that Josh is not campaigning. Instead, he is collecting campaign cash from big donors, lobbyists, and PACs. Hawley thinks he has this campaign all wrapped up... He’s going to be surprised when beat him in August. Let’s keep the pressure on him. [**Add your name to DEMAND that Josh Hawley agree to a debate with Austin Petersen by clicking here >>>**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/demand_josh_hawley_debate?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=060618_debate&n=1) What is Hawley afraid of? I mean, we all know that Austin would crush him in a debate. But if Hawley is so confident about his chances, what does he have to lose? Let’s try to get another 250 signers today. Please add your name and then share the link with your friends. Heather Coil
Communications Director
Austin Petersen for U.S. Senate

He’s going to be surprised when beat him in August. Let’s keep the pressure on him. What is Hawley afraid of? I mean, we all know that Austin would crush him in a debate. But if Hawley is so confident about his chances, what does he have to lose? Let’s try to get another 250 signers today. Please add your name and then share the link with your friends. Heather Coil Communications Director Austin Petersen for U.S. Senate Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate ()

name: Alyssa Milano
subject: A cornerstone of civil rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
We can't wait for our progress.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a635/7ab0e2c4/7f86d781/349bafde/3259006771/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-am?refcode=OHQ06068A") Friend, 2018 has been an incredible year for women -- but we have so far still to go. If you're like me, you're committed to keep fighting for equality in every corner of our country, especially now -- when so many of our civil rights are under attack. While we can't change the White House (yet), we can take a page from the Republican playbook by making change at the state and local level. **That's why I'm so excited about Ben Jealous and Susie Turnbull -- they're the type of leaders we need across the country, and Maryland needs them right now.[Donate $5 or more now to help Ben and Susie win the June 26th Maryland gubernatorial primary!](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a635/7ab0e2c4/7f86d781/349bafde/3259006771/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-am?refcode=OHQ06068A")** _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a635/7ab0e2c4/7f86d781/349bafd9/3259006771/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-am?amount=5&refcode=OHQ06068A&express_lane=true")

---
| | [**OTHER »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a635/7ab0e2c4/7f86d781/349bafc4/3259006771/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-am?refcode=OHQ06068A&express_lane=true")
---
Ben and Susie have made civil rights a cornerstone of their platform, and they're committed to promoting equality for all Marylanders. And with a track record of passing the Maryland DREAM Act, passing marriage equality, and abolishing the death penalty, they're the only ones who can keep pushing for more progress.
It won't be easy, but they have a plan that will work **now**. Not in a few years or even a few months -- their platform is built on the idea that **we can do it now**.
Because while Maryland has made some real progress, we still have much more to do to protect and advance civil rights and ensure that we eliminate inequities that exist in education, the economy, and the criminal justice system. And we can make history, if we do it together.
**That's why I'm asking you to make a grassroots donation today if you agree we can do it now:[Chip in $5 or more today to support Ben and Susie.](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a635/7ab0e2c4/7f86d781/349bafde/3259006771/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-am?refcode=OHQ06068A")**
Thank you,
Alyssa Milano

**[CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a635/7ab0e2c4/7f86d781/349bafde/3259006771/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-am?refcode=OHQ06068A")**

name: Bob Casey
subject: this Senate seat is at risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e668d/51dbcc2a/7943c92/3a2d534/2889353623/VEsH/ "http://www.bobcasey.com/")

I'm going to give it to you straight, team: we didn't raise as much money in May as we expected, and there will be devastating consequences if we don't make up the difference this month.

My team keeps sending me news clips about how this is going to be one of the most expensive Senate races in the country, how Congressman Barletta is expecting a flood of outside spending any day now, and how Democrats will win or lose the Senate majority based on the strength of our campaigns in states like Pennsylvania.

**_[We need to raise another $4,100 by midnight to stay on track. Please, can you chip in $5 to help close the gap?](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e668d/51dbcc2a/7943c92/3a2d535/2889353623/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYm9iLWNhc2V5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbV8yMDE4MDYwNl9mcjFfbmRfczEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180606_fr1_nd_s1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Republicans won this state in 2016, so we can't afford to be complacent. Democrats' path to the majority runs directly through Pennsylvania, and if we lose here and fail to take back the Senate, we won't be able to effectively push back against the most dangerous and divisive pieces of President Trump's agenda.

**There is too much on the line -- we simply cannot fall short. Please donate whatever you can before midnight.**

Here's the best link: **_[https://secure.bobcasey.com/deadline](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e668d/51dbcc2a/7943c92/3a2d535/2889353623/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYm9iLWNhc2V5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbV8yMDE4MDYwNl9mcjFfbmRfczEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180606_fr1_nd_s1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks,

Bob

| Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump Administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e668d/51dbcc2a/7943c92/3a2d535/2889353623/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYm9iLWNhc2V5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbV8yMDE4MDYwNl9mcjFfbmRfczEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180606_fr1_nd_s1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Paul Davis
subject: We can’t stop now!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-PDFY5oOiJPq4xyPaFL33MmW4YguVJp7rUOVEajg9qc=/jOue57F_bLKP6A1-jLA8kZDG0q_b8UHXaEeoYEXvX1g=)
Dear Peter,

Last week, we submitted 4,481 petition signatures, collected by our amazing volunteers in all 25 counties of the district, to get our campaign onto the 2018 ballot. We also met our huge May fundraising goal and reached 5,000 donors to our campaign -- which shows how strong we are.

Supporters like you power this campaign -- at every deadline or goal, you're helping us move forward.

Today officially marks five months from November's election, so we still have work to do. You've shown how much your support can accomplish, and now, we need your help.

**[Can you pledge to support this campaign all the way until the election by making a monthly donation today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/-PDFY5oOiJPq4xyPaFL33MmW4YguVJp7rUOVEajg9qc=/nutc-EJS43C3LYrhATRqJn517VozNcIGuaV06CWR2Nc=?gpsid=11_36_1063&refcode=em18_180606_5month_fnd_gq_ful__PD&utm_campaign=em18_180606_5month_fnd_gq_ful__PD&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&recurring=1)**

I don't want anyone to think that their help is too small. Every single one of our supporters has helped make this campaign a little stronger and pushed us a little further, including you, Peter.

If all of our supporters could give just $5 every month until the election (that's only $25!), we'll be able to take on anything that far-right billionaires and Washington special interests throw at us.

**[What do you say, Peter? If it's possible for you, please make a recurring donation right now and push this campaign over the finish line in November.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-PDFY5oOiJPq4xyPaFL33MmW4YguVJp7rUOVEajg9qc=/nutc-EJS43C3LYrhATRqJn517VozNcIGuaV06CWR2Nc=?gpsid=11_36_1063&refcode=em18_180606_5month_fnd_gq_ful__PD&utm_campaign=em18_180606_5month_fnd_gq_ful__PD&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&recurring=1)**

Thanks,
Paul

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/-PDFY5oOiJPq4xyPaFL33MmW4YguVJp7rUOVEajg9qc=/nutc-EJS43C3LYrhATRqJn517VozNcIGuaV06CWR2Nc=?gpsid=11_36_1063&refcode=em18_180606_5month_fnd_gq_ful__PD&utm_campaign=em18_180606_5month_fnd_gq_ful__PD&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&recurring=1)

Contributions or gifts are not tax deductible. Contributions from foreign nationals and corporations are prohibited. Federal election law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

name: ZephyrForNY.com
subject: [bump] The beating heart of Trump's corruption is right here in New York.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
Peter -
We wanted to make sure you saw Zephyr's note yesterday. She stood in front of Trump Tower and officially launched our campaign.
Attorney General Teachout would be Trump's worst nightmare. She has the courage and the legal know how to take him on head-to-head. Whether suing him and his administration or investigating his businesses for corruption, she will serve as a check on his power and deliver justice for the people.
But she cannot do it alone. Your $3 donation today would go a long way in making sure we win this race.
You can chip in here:
**[https://go.zephyrforny.com/campaign-launch](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e12/6e822e2f/18868930/417211d8/1149861906/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MDYtYSJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/zt-launch?refcode=em180606-a")**
Thanks,
Team Teachout
* * *
#

**We launched our campaign with a speech in front of Trump Tower and made clear that we will take on the corruption and lawlessness of our country 's most powerful people. Chip in $3 now to make sure we're ready to fight back.**
[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e12/6e822e2f/18868930/417211d8/1149861906/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MDYtYSJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/zt-launch?refcode=em180606-a")
Peter -
Earlier today, I stood in front of Trump Tower and formally launched our campaign for Attorney General.
I wanted to send a clear signal about our priorities and where we stand.
We have never seen a threat to our state or our country like the man who owns that tower. He embodies everything that is threatening to destroy our democracy -- rampant corruption, sexual harassment, bigotry, corporate cronyism, abuses of power, lawlessness.
Today we made absolutely clear that we stand against all of that. We believe it is the Attorney General's duty to be a check on his power. No one is above the law -- no matter what he tweets.
I'll be blunt: The New York Attorney General has far more power than has been used to protect us from Trump. Our next AG can and must use these powers to the full extent.
**When I am AG, we will lead the fight to stop Trump 's corruption and set an example for the nation.**
With this announcement, we've drawn a line in the sand. Trump and his wealthy allies have no doubt as to where we stand. That's why they likely don't want to see me anywhere near this office. I need your support to make sure we win.
**[Peter, can you make a $3 donation today? With our official launch, we need to show people that we are in this together. Your contribution sends a message to those that want to stop us that we will not back down. This is important.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e12/6e822e2f/18868930/417211d8/1149861906/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MDYtYSJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/zt-launch?refcode=em180606-a")**
The beating heart of Trump's corruption is right here in New York. It is through the Trump Organization, headquartered here, that he has turned the presidency into his personal ATM -- engaging in highly suspect business deals aimed at funneling money from foreign governments into his own pockets. He has turned our democracy into a kleptocracy.
That is unacceptable.
In fact, it violates the emoluments clause of the Constitution. Every time he uses his businesses to take money from foreign governments, Donald Trump is breaking the law.
Immediately after he took office, I helped sue him for this. I worked with our country's top constitutional lawyers to build the legal team and the strategy behind the suit.
This lawsuit, the first of its kind, has the power to do what other Trump litigation cannot do: get a court order declaring that Trump must divest his business interests.
New York should have been the lead on a parallel suit but did not bring a case. That would not happen again under Attorney General Teachout. I will never take my eye off the threat in the White House.
I want to be clear that this isn't just about Trump either. He represents one of the greatest threats, but we will have the same approach for those that break the law in Albany, on Wall Street or in real estate.
The sword of law is our best answer to the threat of tyranny and unchecked, arbitrary power.
I promise as your Attorney General to wield that awesome power in the name of the people, the law, and justice. That is how we will take down the corrupt elites who have a stranglehold on our democracy and economy.
**[Your $3 donation is so important to making this possible. It's how we will win this campaign, and when we win, we will transform how the system works. We will make clear that no one is above the law-- including the president.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e12/6e822e2f/18868930/417211d8/1149861906/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MDYtYSJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/zt-launch?refcode=em180606-a")**
We know that our country is in desperate need of change, so much of our system is broken. But we cannot wish this change into existence, it's going to require a change in leadership.
That's what we will do in this campaign, and it's why we need you with us. Together we can charge forth and win.
Best,
Zephyr

clean_body: Peter - We wanted to make sure you saw Zephyr's note yesterday. She stood in front of Trump Tower and officially launched our campaign. Attorney General Teachout would be Trump's worst nightmare. She has the courage and the legal know how to take him on head-to-head. Whether suing him and his administration or investigating his businesses for corruption, she will serve as a check on his power and deliver justice for the people. But she cannot do it alone. Your $3 donation today would go a long way in making sure we win this race. You can chip in here: "" Thanks, Team Teachout We launched our campaign with a speech in front of Trump Tower and made clear that we will take on the corruption and lawlessness of our country 's most powerful people. Chip in $3 now to make sure we're ready to fight back. "" Peter - Earlier today, I stood in front of Trump Tower and formally launched our campaign for Attorney General. I wanted to send a clear signal about our priorities and where we stand. We have never seen a threat to our state or our country like the man who owns that tower. He embodies everything that is threatening to destroy our democracy -- rampant corruption, sexual harassment, bigotry, corporate cronyism, abuses of power, lawlessness. Today we made absolutely clear that we stand against all of that. We believe it is the Attorney General's duty to be a check on his power. No one is above the law -- no matter what he tweets. I'll be blunt: The New York Attorney General has far more power than has been used to protect us from Trump. Our next AG can and must use these powers to the full extent. When I am AG, we will lead the fight to stop Trump 's corruption and set an example for the nation. With this announcement, we've drawn a line in the sand. Trump and his wealthy allies have no doubt as to where we stand. That's why they likely don't want to see me anywhere near this office. I need your support to make sure we win. "" The beating heart of Trump's corruption is right here in New York. It is through the Trump Organization, headquartered here, that he has turned the presidency into his personal ATM -- engaging in highly suspect business deals aimed at funneling money from foreign governments into his own pockets. He has turned our democracy into a kleptocracy. That is unacceptable. In fact, it violates the emoluments clause of the Constitution. Every time he uses his businesses to take money from foreign governments, Donald Trump is breaking the law. Immediately after he took office, I helped sue him for this. I worked with our country's top constitutional lawyers to build the legal team and the strategy behind the suit. This lawsuit, the first of its kind, has the power to do what other Trump litigation cannot do: get a court order declaring that Trump must divest his business interests. New York should have been the lead on a parallel suit but did not bring a case. That would not happen again under Attorney General Teachout. I will never take my eye off the threat in the White House. I want to be clear that this isn't just about Trump either. He represents one of the greatest threats, but we will have the same approach for those that break the law in Albany, on Wall Street or in real estate. The sword of law is our best answer to the threat of tyranny and unchecked, arbitrary power. I promise as your Attorney General to wield that awesome power in the name of the people, the law, and justice. That is how we will take down the corrupt elites who have a stranglehold on our democracy and economy. "" We know that our country is in desperate need of change, so much of our system is broken. But we cannot wish this change into existence, it's going to require a change in leadership. That's what we will do in this campaign, and it's why we need you with us. Together we can charge forth and win. Best, Zephyr "" Paid for by Zephyr for NY

body:
| | | Friend -- Today is the day! It’s the first day of the general election, and Martin is officially going head-to-head with two extreme conservatives. With just a few hours left before our first fundraising deadline of the general election, we wanted to ask for your support of Martin’s re-election campaign.

**[Tonight’s deadline is our chance to show New Mexico’s Democratic strength. Your support right now will help turn out voters and set us up for victory in November.](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/-wA/ni0YAA/t.2i3/0GBW7hocSzuvOAtwSvyweA/h0/aHO21LnX1DH2iKGsTPn3bYhi39zkK-2F5KLSrcx61KPVGHIQ47KEFIp4jQohIWFmMXxa9HmWw2IQfn9WhyYqcF2bsM3RhErrfuJkSBcGuWe905WGn7o5OUxb2gWmnEc2cgqDqkRM1oV8OczhB8nD-2BchN4u4WP1GJjK0LfAI7Kf7ILloaKjeaJB-2F-2FpV9uX1-2BviED2CwvlvVaeEq0lMrfdOU-2BZQ4M-2FhOc46-2FmbKWJC-2BKjVoe1-2FAcBI20Ko1v3-2B16NoHC-2BYGTWrnY-2By73JqZD8VsEZ9cq5CCTmJmqKxEJeeBV4y1Xz43GT1HLH9LM5144LpH3yqCCRW4UNw-2FafLRGWvsg960bNvnpXDoJwxZJmaxCbDSS0XtkWZTV4DlXq5Pohy0-2F)**

At the end of this month, we will publicly report our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission (FEC). These numbers will be used as a gauge of Martin’s strength against his two opponents.

In the meantime, Martin is doing everything he can to earn the support of New Mexicans. While it seems like White House lies, corruption, and scandals plague the news and social media, Martin is making real progress in the Senate.

Last month, he led the fight on net neutrality, securing a major Democratic victory in the Senate.

Martin introduced legislation to protect public lands, while the Trump administration only wants to shrink those lands.

And Martin introduced a bill to make college more affordable for students nationwide so they don’t have to choose between an education and avoiding massive debt.

These are real victories and progress on our values, and Martin is working every day to keep that progress going.

**[But he needs your help. We need only 117 contributions to hit our donation goal before midnight. Your donation right now can help make all the difference. Will you pitch in and help us reach our first fundraising goal of the general election?](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/-wA/ni0YAA/t.2i3/0GBW7hocSzuvOAtwSvyweA/h1/aHO21LnX1DH2iKGsTPn3bYhi39zkK-2F5KLSrcx61KPVGHIQ47KEFIp4jQohIWFmMXxa9HmWw2IQfn9WhyYqcF2bsM3RhErrfuJkSBcGuWe905WGn7o5OUxb2gWmnEc2cgqDqkRM1oV8OczhB8nD-2BchN4u4WP1GJjK0LfAI7Kf7ILxZupmAesgcbnrut3BHAd-2BRr5dAv1ilzAQATusWe9MKaR7P-2BNJ7aspYPqHtYqh1O2WEASQkNvRiaYyoxLVmQ8vwp5QUJYCUukHkMVEJ6gRgZvebISxwofrQt-2F-2FMjNk6VNd-2FcK5Lkqg67qnvtXGsMtTuSRNPrUxB90SejGrhFP54CZv5Sezlb8kzk1x9ZXQZ-2BuaxlUsAjPOclZ-2Bl1-2Bpazzo)**

Thanks for standing with Martin.

Team Heinrich

name: Peter Joffrion for Congress
subject: Weekly Update - June 6
body:
**It’s Official!**
With the June 5 primary behind us, Peter Joffrion is now our official Democratic candidate for US Congress in AL05. Mo Brooks won his primary against Clayton Hinchman, but Hinchman’s 39% gain shows that even many Republican voters are unhappy with the status quo. There has never been a better time to flip our district, and Peter Joffrion is the candidate who can do it.

**We’ve Got Signs!**
Signs are in at the Huntsville HQ, so come on down to 303 Williams Ave. Suite 211 to ask for one. Active volunteers are first in line, and you can sign up to volunteer when you drop by to request a sign. We expect these to be in demand all over the district! Our Open House on Friday evening is a great time to come by and get your sign.

**We’re Making a Big Splash**
This week we’re making a splash all over North Alabama! On Tuesday night Peter grilled hot dogs and spoke to supporters at our primary watch party at the Richard Showers Center in Huntsville. We had perfect weather for an outdoor party with lots of friends and fun. We also visited area pools on Wednesday to kick off the swim season for families in the district, and on Friday night we’ll host an Open House at HQ from 5:30 to 8 PM to welcome supporters and sign up new volunteers.

**Alabama in the New York Times?**
Democratic energy in Alabama made a surprise appearance in the New York Times on Sunday, June 4, with an [editorial in the review section](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1353466/7403600/-541153462?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjQ1M2RjNy1jNjY5LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WoykojcZfrQgKmNiAfPIp29f4sita_XtsCxSqDh_ODU=) by Alabama native Alexis Okeowo. Be sure to read this inspiring article if you missed it!

**Volunteer of the Week**
Starting this week, we’re highlighting one of the amazing volunteers who support the campaign in each weekly newsletter. For our first week, we’re recognizing dedicated supporter Christie Buck, whom you will usually find at HQ or any campaign event. Christie’s infectious laugh, cheerful attitude, and tireless work ethic make her a tremendous asset in our effort to flip the 5th in November. Thank you, Christie!

**Indivisible Endorsement**
Just today Peter received an exciting national endorsement from Indivisible! They announced their support via email, Facebook, and Twitter. You'll also find Peter prominently featured on the [Indivisible website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1353467/7403601/-921354652?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjQ1M2RjNy1jNjY5LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WoykojcZfrQgKmNiAfPIp29f4sita_XtsCxSqDh_ODU=). Special thanks are due to our local Indivisible 5th Alabama chapter. We look forward to announcing more endorsements now that Peter is officially the Democratic candidate.

We’ll be back next week with another update! As always, we appreciate your support and [any donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1353468/7403602/-1042528460?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjQ1M2RjNy1jNjY5LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WoykojcZfrQgKmNiAfPIp29f4sita_XtsCxSqDh_ODU=&emci=a76b459a-c469-e811-80c2-00155dc337c6&emdi=1f453dc7-c669-e811-80c2-00155dc337c6&ceid=6984379&am=25&fn=&mn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=&st=&st=&pc=&hp=&mp=&wp=&ep=&oc=&p=&s=&tknfa=NDn88bVYnREsnvJZHso8Q4rcoXY9topWQQdvSEquHSw%3D) you are willing and able to make to support our effort to flip the 5th in November.

Peter Joffrion for Congress

name: Dan Lipinski
subject: supporting our public schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/_yaC52l6JZS_Te7kmNLqIxk2vAlV2gzD-q3BzIHL2kA=/NQyfZYcB-BlETnlVG0-sPFtLXVJ_nxJIVzYLyOQSBkE=)

Peter,

Before being elected to Congress, I taught American Government to college students.

As a teacher, I experienced the joy of helping students learn, while watching them grow in confidence and self-awareness, preparing to take their places in the world.

That's why I'm so passionate about making sure every child and student, from kindergarten to college - and beyond - has access to a great and affordable education.

[**Will you join me in urging my colleagues in Congress to stand with me and fight for more funding for America 's public schools and more support for our educators? Add your name here.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/_yaC52l6JZS_Te7kmNLqIxk2vAlV2gzD-q3BzIHL2kA=/8dbw7cBaiQfWx7BRGX3MQYQ4fRG0o5o0MaS37hHm8bU=?recipientId=3sRleyVCGuRfCtuAizxFV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

[SUPPORT EDUCATORS ->](https://act.myngp.com/el/_yaC52l6JZS_Te7kmNLqIxk2vAlV2gzD-q3BzIHL2kA=/8dbw7cBaiQfWx7BRGX3MQYQ4fRG0o5o0MaS37hHm8bU=?recipientId=3sRleyVCGuRfCtuAizxFV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
One of my top priorities in Congress is leading the fight to improve science, technology, engineering, and math education at all levels of our public school system, encouraging more students to take up STEM.

By providing every student with a 21st-century education, we equip them with the knowledge and tools to reach their potential and help our nation thrive.

It's clear we can do more - and better - if we make sure our K-12 schools, community colleges, and public universities have the funding they need to fulfill their mission of providing every child with a quality education.

[**Join me in urging Congress to provide more funding and support for our nation 's public schools and educators. Our future depends on it. Add your name here.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/_yaC52l6JZS_Te7kmNLqIxk2vAlV2gzD-q3BzIHL2kA=/8dbw7cBaiQfWx7BRGX3MQYQ4fRG0o5o0MaS37hHm8bU=?recipientId=3sRleyVCGuRfCtuAizxFV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

Thanks for taking action.

Dan

Thanks for your support of our campaign.

Contributions or gifts to Lipinski for Congress are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress

name: Joe Donnelly
subject: When automation leads to job loss
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Along with my Senate colleagues Kirsten Gillibrand of New York and Gary Peters of Michigan, I've introduced a bill to address the needs of workers who lose their jobs due to automation. |
---

| | Peter,

Along with my Senate colleagues Kirsten Gillibrand of New York and Gary Peters of Michigan, I've introduced a bill to address the needs of workers who lose their jobs due to automation.

When workers lose jobs because companies ship them overseas, many of them are eligible for Trade Adjustment Assistance (TAA) benefits, such as job training and reemployment services. **But workers who lose jobs to automation aren 't eligible for the same benefits, even though automation is the cause of rapidly increasing numbers of American manufacturing job losses.**

**My take is that these workers deserve help just like anyone else.** So I teamed up with my colleagues to introduce a bill that would extend TAA benefits to workers who are automated out of a job.

[**Will you sign my petition in support of this bill, Peter?**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21a0/7377f838/3c25eb38/51f90476/3831040694/VEsH/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/s/stand-with-joe")

Hoosiers want to go to work every day to support their families, provide their kids with a good education, and retire with dignity -- but when automation makes that impossible, they deserve a chance to access job training or to find new employment that allows them to thrive. This is even more important in Indiana, which has a robust manufacturing sector that is especially vulnerable to automation.

In the Senate, I've always fought to do what's right for our workers and families. Now I'm proud to work with Senators Peters and Gillibrand on legislation that helps Hoosier workers navigate a quickly changing economy.

**Are you with us, Peter?[Add your name if you support our proposal to extend TAA benefits to workers who lose their jobs to automation.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21a0/7377f838/3c25eb38/51f90476/3831040694/VEsE/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/s/stand-with-joe")**

Thank you,
Joe | **[**ADD YOUR NAME**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21a0/7377f838/3c25eb38/51f90476/3831040694/VEsF/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/s/stand-with-joe")**
---

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206
[Unsubscribe](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c21a0/7377f838/3c25eb38/51f90471/3831040694/VEsC/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/unsubscribe")

subject: Weekly Update - New Public Poll, Corey Crushed in Fundraising, Vote Tuesday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stewart for Senate, Inc
body:
| [](http://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/?e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate6_6&n=1)
---
Peter -- With 6 days left, Corey Stewart has doubled all candidates in fundraising and a new Roanoke College poll shows him performing best against Tim Kaine. We're running new ads in every media market; Corey's barnstorming the state; and we're calling our Get Out The Vote List on phones! The deadline to vote absentee in person at your local registrar's office is Saturday, June 9th, at 5 PM. Click [here](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fvote.elections.virginia.gov%2FVoterInformation&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate6_6&n=2) to find your local registrar's office. Check out our weekly update and ways you can help below.
* * *
Corey has raised 2x more than any other Republican Candidate for the June 12th Primary. Corey has 2x has many donors and 3x as many from the Commonwealth of Virginia.
* * *
**Roanoke College Public Poll**

* **Corey performs 5% better than any other Republican candidate against Kaine in November.**

You can read the full campaign memo [here.](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.roanoke.edu%2Fabout%2Fnews%2Frc_poll_politics_june_2018&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate6_6&n=3) ******Internal Poll
** The campaign recently conducted an internal poll that we would like to share with all of you first.

* **Stewart leads all other candidates 3 to 1.**
* Stewart 32%, Freitas 9%, Jackson 5%.
* Stewart has a commanding lead with younger voters under the age of 50!
* Stewart 42%, Freitas 11%, Jackson 4%

You can read the full campaign memo [here](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsupport.coreystewart.com%2Fpdf%2FVirginia-Poll-Memo-052118.pdf&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate6_6&n=4).
* * *
**WE NEED YOUR HELP MAKING CALLS!**
It's GOTV time! Let's get calling for Corey and tell everyone to vote on June 12th! To sign up, go to [**www.coreystewart.com/phone**](http://www.coreystewart.com/phone?e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate6_6&n=5) or contact your local field representative. All callers should be on ** _Stewart GOTV_** and select your congressional district. Here are the scripts: **_GOTV Script:_** Click [here](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fdocs.google.com%2Fdocument%2Fd%2F1rdpSPPy3kVBwctj7oO1DIY42oU3jtE1kt41hJmAY2eA%2Fedit%3Fusp%3Dsharing&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekupdate6_6&n=6).
* * *
**_"A vote for me on Tuesday, June 12th, is a vote for Trump's America First Agenda._****_” \- Corey Stewart _**

* _Repeal Obamacare and Lower Your Premiums_

_See all issues at CoreyStewart.com/issues._

* _Ending the Visa Lottery_

Tom's Jeep isn't the only thing he's driving in Pennsylvania -- our governor has spent the past four years helping to drive Pennsylvania's economy by supporting small businesses.

**[Check out this video of Governor Wolf's brand new TV ad about Pennsylvania small businesses now -- then chip in to help us keep it on the air.](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec256/73a2bc12/3a4ae827/1fcdb196/208037580/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVFWTlVUa0ZOUlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-drive-ad?gpsid=14_50_1044&refcode=em18_180606_drivad_fnd_gq_ful__js&utm_campaign=em18_180606_drivad_fnd_gq_ful__js&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&utm_content=2+-+Check+out+this+video+of+Governor+Wolfs+b")** | [](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec256/73a2bc12/3a4ae827/1fcdb195/208037580/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVFWTlVUa0ZOUlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-drive-ad?gpsid=14_50_1044&refcode=em18_180606_drivad_fnd_gq_ful__js&utm_campaign=em18_180606_drivad_fnd_gq_ful__js&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&utm_content=3")

Small businesses employ near half of Pennsylvanians, and are the engine that drives our economy.

Governor Wolf is helping Pennsylvania small businesses build a better future. He created a one-stop shop for small businesses to cut through red tape and help entrepreneurs grow. And after previous governors tried and failed to eliminate the capital stock tax, Tom got it done.

Now small businesses are growing stronger. They're revved up and ready to go. But our work isn't done yet.

We need to continue our work for Pennsylvania's economy -- and that means continuing to spread the word about how Tom's strengthening our economy.
**[Will you chip in now to help keep Tom's latest ad on the air? Watch the video and make your contribution now.](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec256/73a2bc12/3a4ae827/1fcdb194/208037580/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVFWTlVUa0ZOUlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-drive-ad?gpsid=14_50_1044&refcode=em18_180606_drivad_fnd_gq_ful__js&utm_campaign=em18_180606_drivad_fnd_gq_ful__js&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&utm_content=4+-+Will+you+chip+in+now+to+help+keep+Toms+l")**

name: Senator Tina Smith
subject: This moment is challenging who we are -- what will you do?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Stand up to Attorney General Jeff Sessions and ICE, this is no time to stay silent. | [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b4b3/c1f7015/687514b3/11428db9/1575882803/VEsH/ "https://tinaforminnesota.com/") Friend, This moment is challenging who we are as Minnesotans, as Americans, and frankly what it means to care about each other as human beings. U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement or "ICE," under direction from Attorney General Sessions and the Trump administration, is taking extreme action against our friends and neighbors who have come to America seeking a better life. We are seeing immigrants arrested while gardening, parents arrested after ICE waited for them outside of their children's schools, and even immigrants who served in our nation's armed forces detained and deported. This is to say nothing of the inhumane and often awful conditions of the detention centers where these men and women are held. **I cannot just sit back and do nothing.** The first step is putting in place crucial protections for minors who are left defenseless when their parents are detained by ICE. That's why I'm putting forth my bill the "HELP Separated Children Act" to start to take on Trump and force ICE to act to defend families, instead of separating them. [**Will you fight back? Add your name here. This is not who we are, and we can 't allow it to continue.**](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b4b3/c1f7015/687514b3/11428dba/1575882803/VEsE/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_180606_HELPact?source=rtw_180606_helpact-full") Here's what this bill will do:
* Give parents a chance to arrange for care of their child in any detainment scenario
* Permit parents to participate if there is a family court case related to their separation
* Protect children from being coerced into translating for their parents for ICE
* Allow parents to make a plan for any potential departure, and force ICE to keep the family in mind in any decisions affecting their parents

I know this fight will not be easy. Jeff Sessions is our Attorney General; ICE feels empowered by the racist and frightening rhetoric from our President and his supporters. But this is too important to sit back. Are you ready to join this fight? [**Add your name to oppose ICE 's attacks on our families.**](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b4b3/c1f7015/687514b3/11428dbb/1575882803/VEsF/ "http://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_180606_HELPact?source=rtw_180606_helpact-full") Thank you for being a part of this, Tina **[Add Your Name](action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_180606_HELPact?source=rtw_180606_helpact-full)**
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b4b3/c1f7015/687514b3/11428dbc/1575882803/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: Regina Bateson
subject: Thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bateson for Congress
body:
Peter,
As you’ve probably seen by now, last night we fell short.
While we didn’t get the outcome we worked for, we still did an amazing thing. Together, we rejected PAC money and special interest help in exchange for people power. We embraced grassroots support and rejected negative, misleading political tactics. We ran a campaign that the people of our district needed and deserved.
While the ending isn’t what I wished for, I wouldn’t change anything about those I made the journey with -- all of you!
You inspired me when I was low, you uplifted me when I was down, and you energized me when I was tired. I could not have made it this far without you.
While we all may be disappointed, this country needs people like you now more than ever. There is much work to be done! We need you to stay engaged and keep fighting to flip CA-04!
I am not going away. I will join you in fighting for the values we cherish and the future we all want to give to our children.
Thank you again from the bottom of my heart.
-- Regina
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62063/images/Regina%20Bateson%20for%20Congress%20logo.png]Regina is running for Congress in California’s highly competitive 4th Congressional District.
Help spread the word! Forward this email to 5 friends to help Regina’s grassroots campaign grow.
Regina can’t win this race without support from people like you. Join her people-powered movement by contributing here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-footer?&amount=25.00&recurring=true]

clean_body: Peter, As you’ve probably seen by now, last night we fell short. While we didn’t get the outcome we worked for, we still did an amazing thing. Together, we rejected PAC money and special interest help in exchange for people power. We embraced grassroots support and rejected negative, misleading political tactics. We ran a campaign that the people of our district needed and deserved. While the ending isn’t what I wished for, I wouldn’t change anything about those I made the journey with -- all of you! You inspired me when I was low, you uplifted me when I was down, and you energized me when I was tired. I could not have made it this far without you. While we all may be disappointed, this country needs people like you now more than ever. There is much work to be done! We need you to stay engaged and keep fighting to flip CA-04! I am not going away. I will join you in fighting for the values we cherish and the future we all want to give to our children. Thank you again from the bottom of my heart. -- Regina [ is running for Congress in California’s highly competitive 4th Congressional District. Help spread the word! name: Bill Nelson
subject: thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bill Nelson for U
body:
[](https://secure.nelsonforsenate.com/page/m/32d0c4f5/24898984/65b7f48/6a82b98e/3819096848/VEsH/ "https://nelsonforsenate.com/")
[](https://secure.nelsonforsenate.com/page/m/32d0c4f5/24898984/65b7f48/6a82b98e/3819096848/VEsE/ "https://nelsonforsenate.com/")
Friend,
I saw that you recently joined our team, and I just wanted to say thanks.
I've had the privilege of serving the people of Florida in many ways: first in the state Legislature, then Congress, then on Florida's Cabinet and now in the United States Senate.
As a fifth-generation Floridian, I grew up on Florida's Space Coast, not far from where I launched into orbit as a crew member aboard the Space Shuttle Columbia.
To this day, I can still vividly recall looking back at our planet from the window of the space shuttle and seeing how fragile it looked, and realizing how we're all in this together.
That's why, in the Senate, I've been fighting to protect Florida's unique environment and keep oil rigs away from our coast. And I believe, now more than ever, Florida needs leaders in Washington who are willing to stand up to this administration when their extreme agenda threatens our state.
There's no doubt that our race here in Florida will be one of the most competitive contests of 2018. Gov. Scott was recruited by President Trump to run against us, and extreme right-wing groups are already spending millions of dollars to attack my record.
But what these groups don't understand is that this campaign isn't about me; it's about you, and the roughly 21 million people who call Florida home.
**And while I 'm ready to keep fighting, I want to hear what's most important to you: **[Can you click here to share your top issues and concerns?](https://secure.nelsonforsenate.com/page/m/32d0c4f5/24898984/65b7f48/6a82b989/3819096848/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09Ijoid2VsY29tZSIsImUzc2daVzFoYVd4Q2IyUjVRWE5ySUgxOSI6IjUiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://surveys.signforgood.com/nelson-priorities-survey?code=welcome&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****
Thanks again for joining our team and standing with me!
Bill
[Contribute](https://secure.nelsonforsenate.com/page/m/32d0c4f5/24898984/65b7f48/6a82b988/3819096848/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibmVsc29uX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJ3ZWxjb21lIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/nelson_email?refcode=welcome&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Thoughts on this final week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Hi Peter,

With just under a week until the June 12 Democratic Primary, I've been reflecting on everything we've accomplished these past 11 months. It's been an incredible process and I'm proud of everything we've done, from our 106 meet and greets to the thousands of doors we've knocked to the TV and mail ads we've produced that are representative of my candidacy and the campaign we're running.

And none of this would've been possible without the right people, the right message, and the right approach. From the beginning, we've committed ourselves to building a campaign that gives regular citizens a chance to bring the change they want to see in their own community. We've encouraged people of the 7th to contribute their time, their talents, and their investment in this race. Why?

**Because that 's what it's going to take to beat Dave Brat in November.**

We're in a great position heading into this final week, but we're not slowing down. We're still on the phones, we're still knocking doors, we're still getting our message out. [And that means we still need your support.](https://act.myngp.com/el/10BWsR9KXkH257nUJafVCfmPC3oDMLVP8qgMc1RHe_U=/gbgFbItYHnwhM1W3TLaAV71CYeHWWKjz1E3Q3b4gNLs=?refcode=6days)

Let's accelerate across the finish line, Peter, and send a message to the District that we're serious about flipping this seat. **[Donate to Team Spanberger today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/10BWsR9KXkH257nUJafVCfmPC3oDMLVP8qgMc1RHe_U=/gbgFbItYHnwhM1W3TLaAV71CYeHWWKjz1E3Q3b4gNLs=?refcode=6days)**

Sincerely,

Abigail
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/10BWsR9KXkH257nUJafVCfmPC3oDMLVP8qgMc1RHe_U=/gbgFbItYHnwhM1W3TLaAV71CYeHWWKjz1E3Q3b4gNLs=?refcode=6days)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/10BWsR9KXkH257nUJafVCfmPC3oDMLVP8qgMc1RHe_U=/kKH8ReFGHp2tZ7QN01DGqyEROH3TIhvhgwgMj2Lo-_o=)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/10BWsR9KXkH257nUJafVCfmPC3oDMLVP8qgMc1RHe_U=/AjBKGD9hPmIvDrFF0FV7K3gD5K3SgUDkqYUcViLQrXE=)_

According to **[new internal polling](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c90ed9fbbd074b1ba15cbf73c619fc8c&_e=s-nQ1sDFrz-X8NMVdKaFYObNlH_BNIeQuOpz8H0gimcHZOJl_6mtmV_tbbV0ngO9W0rkZdvBCjOLXkloiDFY9GeDK3nTTnaylL8h-HX1gFB6tYcM7MkCKqV4K4cPvy1wyyj_LAIORrHRSg-xWaAc_Ki9VEKSv9rTmQjnhWyak8PO3rqq_wusSSwXK0jjhFkLWaTiGFVVKneaa-xiLBdd-X-zPNxo8oQ2eBicme98dC-dbeGaeGpcbw0L0f74s-cy5RejTDohMeVsxm09yfYgWu5I1BAh-ElcTmbt8Ro9RPwHv3fgmz_qhAVP9FDReBqIEIpWgN9F8U8xLIALZRFi9iUWXHz1FlcHDR8aCcBqh795WB-tkWyoETfnkxaZsvkbD2sW1-AAhvMJdZ4yA9SZj0t838s5QIeBhduR6fH9CK3KAyESrScQ5h0h47kFonP0FF1LV8mBxvgXsBe7PThGOuENbWx11G2XB9r_MUk-fpM%3D)** , my primary opponent has lost dramatic ground following our historic victory at last month's GOP convention.

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c90ed9fbbd074b1ba15cbf73c619fc8c&_e=TFATiRd0525mif5dPZYsTQGQYKO8sacBcwezsnz3BMmDy9N22h25m4u43x20fRyT9SBURYxlrEQJxVwG-crBkfoL6h6bDg1KENLEi6mJ58y1EOZZBrSU7qD4r3VbHr1RjFQqFPOSfy5xJfiKzNLEAY4XAp19r-vANI52cc1BIg8bo_QEJQfRxQNlgg2uga7zFdJUJNU3tRKgjlJy3_NsTIT_MMpFP0TH5vFqa0G3OIaedLcSiQ5WTy2B5IkdEFMq). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c90ed9fbbd074b1ba15cbf73c619fc8c&_e=s-nQ1sDFrz-X8NMVdKaFYMbx3Fu8urBs3RPS6yQ3DmD6CmmaH7Fa7YWojFMiBcExnIGJDt-ZJmVSZi8n0AGRIphTcv1w_puj5JuGm1rlKwbif8J4UmrkLlb3MMV297vEuJnrAOaoTKwg_GUTmoFkseT_fWDHCW-joobZ5BzVjhEshEeLXYFp1gKk8v5x2gTNiqGIHKN7psW3g3Da83PjZOlDSiooDHf5ri_i0mqSqJoQpfLzBIWk9ZcYtq12kzZlBAPJ-Vsiom4rS0_CfCQB0Z0bEzE56ix_DU4VJgp_6YoCfWajQqnu_jJO6XIJYK9NCtUeUtzK4txbxLbup1-YVNsLQmh-e4WsPVDMI-boKSortsmQAvLzPKq7wyKRKru-) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c90ed9fbbd074b1ba15cbf73c619fc8c&_e=s-nQ1sDFrz-X8NMVdKaFYMbx3Fu8urBs3RPS6yQ3DmBSYYrNHCSxNx-gvU3qiQG4_Br7BgFmrykELu7Tur-8vXsIeQoGpSC2gnKhu0UW6rCjSuTJVQ_ySUOx84trzDdFsq2Do3SgTX-N0B3URLS2Ct5qbOcLb_i1Wn_kDYg9GbVYB1d1EJf_OS6NKCIIgF-Er06dNnouJe6NncsZw2FgmbtaJ3d0GFaygNg8QpApgG5MrefcE1C1_cHbwABwdEJpQ9tJriHc6tiUQCrdjIpROHfrsoreylftSb9YdyxGRCmb9gRRagUN2nn1ALh3UWL8F_l8NfubSZ7Ov46SP3liNyObKko6vEeMPJPWbtc1ULuQEJkF3wqVdeOjlUxxTgb7) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c90ed9fbbd074b1ba15cbf73c619fc8c&_e=s-nQ1sDFrz-X8NMVdKaFYDtWb-IeTLOi9TrX-xj8b0BoFMWK9JcmZyY3FkCfrOF9Mxq5AtS7750syKfdwLMDyQBox_pQ9YVafKRlfiZ4be4YJd-ZWvpaBSkpODPr01t49U8fJD3GWg3twcwvVU1FXdVpXkM8OxgkrfrdYSlecJSiN_kmWuvvSfSCeFZdOMDOQloW1a3SH503EB7mZb0yen-gl4fMs6lrrXnM6QRGzKOa2u-rRZ-Jocj5U6OMa9jNUMeR5QFc7jCUbVmQ2nIxiA%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c90ed9fbbd074b1ba15cbf73c619fc8c&_e=s-nQ1sDFrz-X8NMVdKaFYChe1beeRmnrd5kHrgNoq_cKK5PrFuoDMoVsd8v3TGMte7HNh1FzXh2q3AXUH-NGSZDp63PH-Z6ndqnhqAQ3b6bV0h3mlxmNATpiyYeYwuMOQkJ6CJPBw_5AQXYFkNbkyfZB33cKmwJybcg2CiENYXcPqgyPULav467rOR-dIijVOLDcGgKFA-tLPWhtOpGaOuP8GwHzdtQB9AbuFcRBcavhlfYYXN6xc0s_PM4rTuv5BG_N-yylX3TWqahVNAS5QQ%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c90ed9fbbd074b1ba15cbf73c619fc8c&_e=s-nQ1sDFrz-X8NMVdKaFYFnjK4-z3JSr8Wn3JI-iBiR8hdWDTT09oOoLjrnVeBb9nCI8qgJl5VEcg4VL-WJ2ynqsKmTLq3mgLYq5uQxo1GfYNQXV_2S_XwbDy1lv--LOzxSQ2Qw_Ve3-tEHcxAVj5US5IE6sxxfVkqyXqtiDt46zwEkCFHQeq4uJ_gqHxJApBeI2YInyWdQT1t4goQ9Nl1r2RIpKJBgfMfIKzybhS39KXoGKs67o_AA7u7JK2WgXvD-Ovvx4BBkHyzfUrAvjMA%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite.
