name: Bryan Caforio
subject: extraordinarily grateful
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRYAN CAFORIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.bryancaforio.com/page/m/1d3843a9/169f49de/34d3d63b/338642b2/3347065577/VEsH/ "http://bryancaforio.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=caforio&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=BC_EM_TY_WL_180606&source=BC_EM_TY_WL_180606&refcode=BC_EM_TY_WL_180606")

| |
Hi Peter,

While the final result did not turn out as we had hoped, Lisa and I are extraordinarily grateful to our dedicated volunteers who knocked on doors, made calls, and hosted house parties with their neighbors; the men and women of the labor movement who put their faith in me to be a champion for working families; our high school and college interns who chose to spend their free time working to build a better future for themselves and young people across our community; the voters of California's 25th District who showed up to make their voices heard in what I believe is the most important election of our lifetimes; and, of course, all of you.

Lisa and I decided to embark on this journey because we believe the future of our democracy is at stake as long as President Trump and his enablers in Congress remain in office. Please join us in spending every day for the next five months working to make sure this is Congressman Knight's last term. Our community and our country deserve better.

Thank you again for all your support. We wouldn't have gotten this far without you.

Keep fighting,

Bryan **** **** **** **** **** **** |
---

|

Valencia, CA 91355

name: Emily Cain, EMILY's List
subject: A truly SUPER Tuesday for women
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4588/24c69fd9/1abbe5810/1881b4fe/79435337/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFER13N_digital_email_20180606_STreportback_inact&source=WQEFER13N_digital_email_20180606_STreportback_inact")
---

Peter,

Super Tuesday results are in!

We had 48 endorsed pro-choice Democratic women on the ballot, and so far 40 of them have won!

Here's a breakdown:
* **House:** Seven of our candidates on the ballot last night won, including four running in red-to-blue races! The results for five of our California candidates will likely trickle in this week -- we'll be sure to keep you up-to-date on how things play out in the Golden State.

* **Governor:** We're thrilled Michelle Lujan Grisham won her primary in New Mexico -- she's now one step closer to being the nation's first-ever Democratic Latina governor!

* **State & Local:** 31 of our state and local candidates won last night, including Lauren Arthur (MO-SD17), who won her red-to-blue special election, and Deidre DeJear who, if elected, would be Iowa's first black statewide elected official as secretary of state.

We're so proud of all of our women who stepped up and put their names on the ballot.

But there's no time to rest: There are primary elections nearly every Tuesday this month. That means more of our women are on the ballot in just six days in Maine, Nevada, and Virginia.

**Donate $3 to support our women with primaries next Tuesday and all of our women running for office this year:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Win-Next-Tuesday](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4588/24c69fd9/1abbe5810/1881b4ff/79435337/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180606_email_SuperTuesdayReportback?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgWinNextTuesday&utm_campaign=WQEFER13N_digital_email_20180606_STreportback_inact&source=WQEFER13N_digital_email_20180606_STreportback_inact")**

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4588/24c69fd9/1abbe5810/1881b4f8/79435337/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180606_email_SuperTuesdayReportback?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WQEFER13N_digital_email_20180606_STreportback_inact&source=WQEFER13N_digital_email_20180606_STreportback_inact")

|

name: Tom Perez
subject: We're at a turning point, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
After last night's primaries, I can tell you for certain we're at a huge turning point in the midterms. Let me explain why:
---
After last night's primaries, I can tell you for certain we're at a huge turning point in the midterms. Let me explain why:

These primary results proved Democrats have momentum and we are harnessing the growing enthusiasm across the country -- and together we came out of last night with some incredible wins. Here are a few highlights:
* Dozens of Democratic women are heading to general elections including: Katie Hill (CA-25), Katie Porter (CA-45), Abby Finkenauer (IA-01), Cindy Axne (IA-03), Deb Haaland (NM-01), Xochitl Torres Small (NM-02), Mikie Sherrill (NJ-11), and Michelle Lujan Grisham for New Mexico governor.
* One of those women, Deb Haaland (NM-01), is one step closer to becoming the first Native American congresswoman.
* Democrats flipped our 42nd state legislative seat, a Missouri state Senate seat by 19 points in a district that Trump won by four points in 2016.

Last night was a great night for our party -- but we can't sit back and call it a day. As more primaries end, general elections begin -- and right now campaigns and state parties across the country are ramping up their organizing efforts to take their message to voters. Those campaigns and state parties are counting on our support now. Not in October -- now. So I'm asking:

**Can I count on you to make your first $3 contribution of 2018? If you've been waiting to get involved, now is the time.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522dce/4067b0a/5bc73d3e0/7fb8f20a/1885908599/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super-tuesday-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180606_tp_nd&source=em_20180606_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180606_tp_nd")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522dce/4067b0a/5bc73d3e0/7fb8f20b/1885908599/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super-tuesday-2018?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180606_tp_nd&source=em_20180606_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180606_tp_nd")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522dce/4067b0a/5bc73d3e0/7fb8f208/1885908599/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super-tuesday-2018?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180606_tp_nd&source=em_20180606_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180606_tp_nd")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522dce/4067b0a/5bc73d3e0/7fb8f209/1885908599/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super-tuesday-2018?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180606_tp_nd&source=em_20180606_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180606_tp_nd")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522dce/4067b0a/5bc73d3e0/7fb8f216/1885908599/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super-tuesday-2018?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180606_tp_nd&source=em_20180606_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180606_tp_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522dce/4067b0a/5bc73d3e0/7fb8f217/1885908599/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/super-tuesday-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180606_tp_nd&source=em_20180606_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180606_tp_nd")
** I am proud of the work we're doing together to elect Democrats in all 50 states -- and I firmly believe if it hadn't been for people like you working to rebuild our party, we wouldn't have seen the results and record turnout that we did last night.

Democrats across the country are ready to organize and win -- and your support today will ensure our party has the resources to mobilize millions of voters this year.

**[June is the most important month we've faced yet, so if you've been waiting to get involved now is the time. Make your first $3 contribution of 2018 today.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522dce/4067b0a/5bc73d3e0/7fb8f214/1885908599/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/super-tuesday-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-++if+consinConsGroup29422+Thank+you+CUSTO&utm_campaign=em_20180606_tp_nd&source=em_20180606_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180606_tp_nd")**

Thanks for stepping up to stand with Democrats nationwide.

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Here are a few highlights: Dozens of Democratic women are heading to general elections including: Katie Hill (CA-25), Katie Porter (CA-45), Abby Finkenauer (IA-01), Cindy Axne (IA-03), Deb Haaland (NM-01), Xochitl Torres Small (NM-02), Mikie Sherrill (NJ-11), and Michelle Lujan Grisham for New Mexico governor. name: =?utf-8?Q?Courtland?=
subject: Hogg vs. Murphy -- You be the Judge
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COURTLAND SYKES FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---
| | | [ ](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=f53ab6ec3f&e=9da9b0ca31)
---
| **Peter,**
This is what we've come to -- David Hogg is being celebrated by the fake news media as a hero, schools everywhere are entertaining his "walk-out" movement to strip us of our gun rights and to teach our children that guns are not only evil, but something that only the select few should have.

Today, Hogg is celebrating his 18th birthday. Already he is being funded and bolstered by Soros-elements.

**Hogg is the new American Hero?**

For those of us who read history, however, we can only look at this fake-news spectacle in shock and shame. No wonder liberals love Common Core and it's History-abolishing curriculum. Liberals don't want our children to know about REAL heroes like the 17-year old Audie Murphy in WWII. Heroes who, younger than David Hogg, wielded guns to save the lives of their fellow man.

This editorial laid it out yesterday comparing the two -- it's worth a read:
[](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=f53ab6ec3f&e=9da9b0ca31) **_"...Hogg apparently, forgot to read about Audie Murphy, the Texas veteran who at about Hogg's age in WWII, climbed on a tank in an open field and surrounded by Germans who were firing at him from every side, stood alone for more than an hour in a unrelenting hail of bullets until he killed every German in that field—over 50 of them._** _Audie Murphy, lied about his age to join the army when he was Hogg's age, 17. By odd coincidence Hogg rather resembles Audie Murphy in physical appearance—most services rejected Murphy because he was short and underweight, but beyond superficial physical comparisons, the comparisons stop._ _**Murphy, at 17, enlisted in the heat of war, in 1942 and in the next three years did hard combat in nine vicious campaigns. By 19, Audie Murphy had won every Army combat award available in those years, had become a national hero, had risen to lieutenant and had became the most decorated man in WWII. **_ _**_Then, at Comar Pocket in France, Audie Murphy, barely 20—at an age too young to buy a gun in Hogg's new Florida—did spectacularly more with a gun,_** earning the Congressional Medal of Honor by acts of courage never matched. His congressional citation reads in part:_

_FROM THE CONGRESSIONAL RECORD:_ _Murphy killed large numbers of the advancing enemy infantry with the advancing tanks abreast of his position. 2nd Lt Murphy climbed on the burning tank destroyer, which was in danger of blowing up at any moment, and employed its .50 caliber machine gun against the enemy. He was alone and exposed to German fire from 3 sides, but his deadly fire killed dozens of Germans and caused their infantry attack to waver. The enemy tanks, losing infantry support, began to fall back. For an hour, the Germans tried every available weapon to eliminate 2nd Lt. Murphy, but he held his position and wiped out a squad . . . . Germans reached as close as 10 yards only to be mowed down by his fire. He received a leg wound but ignored it and continued the single-handed fight until his ammunition was exhausted. He then made his way to his company, refusing medical attention, and organized the company into a counterattack, which forced the Germans to withdraw. . . . he killed about 50. 2nd Lt. Murphy's indomitable courage and his refusal to give an inch of ground saved the company . . . ." Excerpted from the Politican [Read more...](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=f53ab6ec3f&e=9da9b0ca31)_
---
|
---
| Clearly, we have lost touch with the reality of TRUE heroism.

Audie Murphy was a hero. A young man who's story should be celebrated today.

David Hogg is NOT a hero. David Hogg is the anti-hero who is being bolstered and pushed by Soros money to tear down conservatives like Laura Ingraham and to bully the rest of America into submission.

We must stop this. Celebrate with me, today, the Audie Murphys not the David Hoggs.

Please share this email. Don't let the unhinged, gun-grabbing liberals hijack the definition of true heroism with the likes of their poster-children like Hogg.

Pledge to stand with me.

Sincerely,

Courtland Sykes
---

name: Jessica Morse
subject: We won last night—now, game on!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/tAV33szvfoQ5p4vrjHONE9BJIkjLsDAVDlckUbLJaWg=/uYq729Zc2WnF86i1BjzKOM0l-zny-mYd7qLlSfJX7pY=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180606_JM_gameon_all_logo&recurring=auto)
Peter,

We won! I'm overwhelmed with gratitude, humbled, and honored to be going on to the general election.

This happened because of the hard work and dedication of _so many_ volunteers and supporters who made calls, donated, and had conversations with their neighbors. Together, we proved that a campaign built on real solutions to the real challenges facing our community can win. We proved that a campaign powered by grassroots energy--from Tahoe to Tollhouse, from rural Sonora to Roseville--can win.

We all get a few days off from knocking our neighbors' doors--but then, the real fight begins. I'm not going to sugarcoat this: It's going to take lots of hard work to beat Tom McClintock in November. But if any team can pull it off, I know this one can.

McClintock and his allies will pull every page from the old-school political playbook, and his special interest backers will spend millions of dollars to keep this seat. Starting today, we all need to recommit to the fight. If you're with me, chip in with a donation now:

[$15 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/tAV33szvfoQ5p4vrjHONE9BJIkjLsDAVDlckUbLJaWg=/uYq729Zc2WnF86i1BjzKOM0l-zny-mYd7qLlSfJX7pY=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180606_JM_gameon_all_15&amount=15) | [$25 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/tAV33szvfoQ5p4vrjHONE9BJIkjLsDAVDlckUbLJaWg=/uYq729Zc2WnF86i1BjzKOM0l-zny-mYd7qLlSfJX7pY=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180606_JM_gameon_25&amount=25&recurring=auto)
---|---
[$50 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/tAV33szvfoQ5p4vrjHONE9BJIkjLsDAVDlckUbLJaWg=/uYq729Zc2WnF86i1BjzKOM0l-zny-mYd7qLlSfJX7pY=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180606_JM_gameon_all_50&amount=50&recurring=auto) | [$100 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/tAV33szvfoQ5p4vrjHONE9BJIkjLsDAVDlckUbLJaWg=/uYq729Zc2WnF86i1BjzKOM0l-zny-mYd7qLlSfJX7pY=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180606_JM_gameon_all_100&amount=100&recurring=auto)
[$250 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/tAV33szvfoQ5p4vrjHONE9BJIkjLsDAVDlckUbLJaWg=/uYq729Zc2WnF86i1BjzKOM0l-zny-mYd7qLlSfJX7pY=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180606_JM_gameon_all_250&amount=250&recurring=auto) | [Other >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/tAV33szvfoQ5p4vrjHONE9BJIkjLsDAVDlckUbLJaWg=/uYq729Zc2WnF86i1BjzKOM0l-zny-mYd7qLlSfJX7pY=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180606_JM_gameon_all_other&recurring=auto)

I know this team has what it takes to bring home a win in November. In the primary, we reached out to more than 60,000 of our neighbors in every corner of this district--and we did so while grounding our grassroots campaign in real solutions, maintaining integrity and civility, and raising the baseline standards for our democracy.

McClintock said of our efforts, "The shrill voices of the left do not speak for the people of our communities." This is what McClintock thinks of his constituents. He not only refuses to listen to them--he considers them a nuisance. Throughout the campaign, my internal motto has been "a little more grace." I have been so grateful to see all of our supporters maintain so much grace and integrity during this campaign.

But turning that grace and perseverance into victory will take resources and energy. We can't fall short now--not with so much on the line. McClintock doesn't live in our district, doesn't listen to our concerns, and doesn't fight for the solutions we need. We can do better--and we must.

[Help us build the operation that can take McClintock on--and vote him out. Chip in $25 now to help us kick off the general election.](https://act.myngp.com/el/tAV33szvfoQ5p4vrjHONE9BJIkjLsDAVDlckUbLJaWg=/VXr0UZbPFNmSz7N-njR8zejYD2P96SC00awqdYwVL-Q=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180606_JM_gameon_all_l1&recurring=auto&amount=25)

Game on, folks. One victory down--one to go! Let's dig deep and continue moving forward until we succeed in making our mark on history!

Thank you,
Jessica

[CONTRIBUTE >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/tAV33szvfoQ5p4vrjHONE9BJIkjLsDAVDlckUbLJaWg=/uYq729Zc2WnF86i1BjzKOM0l-zny-mYd7qLlSfJX7pY=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180606_JM_gameon_all_contribbutton&recurring=auto)

clean_body: Peter, We won! I'm overwhelmed with gratitude, humbled, and honored to be going on to the general election. This happened because of the hard work and dedication of so many volunteers and supporters who made calls, donated, and had conversations with their neighbors. Together, we proved that a campaign built on real solutions to the real challenges facing our community can win. We proved that a campaign powered by grassroots energy--from Tahoe to Tollhouse, from rural Sonora to Roseville--can win. We all get a few days off from knocking our neighbors' doors--but then, the real fight begins. I'm not going to sugarcoat this: It's going to take lots of hard work to beat Tom McClintock in November. But if any team can pull it off, I know this one can. McClintock and his allies will pull every page from the old-school political playbook, and his special interest backers will spend millions of dollars to keep this seat. Starting today, we all need to recommit to the fight. If you're with me, chip in with a donation now: | ---|--- | | I know this team has what it takes to bring home a win in November. In the primary, we reached out to more than 60,000 of our neighbors in every corner of this district--and we did so while grounding our grassroots campaign in real solutions, maintaining integrity and civility, and raising the baseline standards for our democracy. McClintock said of our efforts, "The shrill voices of the left do not speak for the people of our communities." This is what McClintock thinks of his constituents. He not only refuses to listen to them--he considers them a nuisance. Throughout the campaign, my internal motto has been "a little more grace." I have been so grateful to see all of our supporters maintain so much grace and integrity during this campaign. But turning that grace and perseverance into victory will take resources and energy. We can't fall short now--not with so much on the line. McClintock doesn't live in our district, doesn't listen to our concerns, and doesn't fight for the solutions we need. We can do better--and we must. Game on, folks. One victory down--one to go! Let's dig deep and continue moving forward until we succeed in making our mark on history! Thank you, Jessica Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign. Jessica Morse for Congress 1079 Sunrise Ave Ste B 275 Roseville CA 95611 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please=.

name: Team Beto
subject: BREAKING: Beto's within single digits of Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
#
Hey there, Public Policy Polling just released a brand-new poll and we wanted you to be the first to see:
Ted Cruz: 48%
Beto: 42%
Public Policy Polling | June 6, 2018
**[This is huge news. We're within single digits of winning this race! Help us capture this momentum and rush a $3 contribution to our campaign. Your donations help power our grassroots organizing efforts in the field -- and they help us keep Beto on the road, meeting with more Texans to close the gap.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92107/3b1d797/7ea1803c/35a85a5e/2518159448/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-180606-poll?refcode=ema180606&amount=3")**
From day one of this campaign, we threw out the establishment's political playbook. We pledged to never accept a dime from PACs or special interests and instead put our trust in people.
And it's working. Today's poll numbers are the direct result of the hard work you and our grassroots team have put in day after day to build support for Beto. **You should be proud.**
But Ted Cruz's big-spending allies like the Koch brothers and a super PAC based in Virginia (of all places) are already ramping up to attack Beto and save Cruz.
And with less than five months to go until Election Day, you can be sure Ted Cruz is going to use this poll to rally even more special-interest groups and super PACs on his side to dump money into Texas and swing this election in his favor.

name: Alert via Tim Kaine 2018
subject: BREAKING: Six-figure investments in Virginia race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
We just got some major news about the Virginia Senate race, and we wanted you to hear it directly from us. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- **Derek: We just got some major news about the Virginia Senate race, and we wanted you to hear it directly from us.** | **A dark money pro-Rand Paul super PAC _and_ the Koch Brothers have filed six-figure independent expenditures in Virginia to defeat Tim Kaine.**
---
National Republicans aren't just _talking_ about taking out Tim in Virginia - they're **spending dark money** here, too. And what's more, they're supporting Nick Freitas - a candidate who has blamed school shootings on "the abortion industry." _This is not a drill, Derek._

Virginians will vote in the primary election in less than a week - and we need to be ready to take on whichever Republican comes out on top. **_But we can't fight back against the Koch brothers' hundreds of thousands of dollars and other piles of outside dark money without your support._**
[Please consider making an early donation to our general election fund right now.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13fd/3e0906/647959fd/3e3438ae/3983065568/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180606_2_FR_TEAM_Breaking-AdBuy&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Please+consider+making+an+early+donation&utm_campaign=20180606_2_FR_TEAM_Breaking-AdBuy&source=20180606_2_FR_TEAM_Breaking-AdBuy")

And what's more, they're supporting Nick Freitas - a candidate who has blamed school shootings on "the abortion industry." This is not a drill, Derek. Virginians will vote in the primary election in less than a week - and we need to be ready to take on whichever Republican comes out on top. But we can't fight back against the Koch brothers' hundreds of thousands of dollars and other piles of outside dark money without your support. name: Martin Heinrich
subject: preparing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
| | | Today is Day 1 of the general election, and my team and I set a goal to earn another 235 contributions by midnight tonight. Right now, we’re only 19 gifts away from reaching that goal, and I’m hoping you can help by making a contribution right now.

**[In 2016, we saw what can happen if we aren’t prepared. Please, you can make a gift to my campaign at this link to help us prepare for the conservative attacks to come.](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/4gA/ni0YAA/t.2i3/-x-FP5pLQpyGNnuHTFG43A/h0/aHO21LnX1DH2iKGsTPn3bYhi39zkK-2F5KLSrcx61KPVGHIQ47KEFIp4jQohIWFmMXxa9HmWw2IQfn9WhyYqcF2bsM3RhErrfuJkSBcGuWe905WGn7o5OUxb2gWmnEc2cgnUtHzwoV3-2BAQc3gX-2FK5BJYw-2Fg9nVqqyZJ59wUb-2FNen69-2Fo0vZgLFd0oKA-2FeuSHcxGvXKuIdBOhsmnz-2FboUiatuBkomx1z-2FvumfPV89neKaH-2BG1OgxRN59RO2zqPoNh4ojrUwFO3OJ22TjEsCWOESdOsA-2BWT4i6GlIVluLfTq0f8EZY75Av5HW1Y9-2BKXBj8YB3vGEvE5Y0FC8d7VPRO9FsQ-3D-3D)**

\-- Martin

_Begin original message:_

Friend -- Today is the day! It’s the first day of the general election, and Martin is officially going head-to-head with two extreme conservatives. With just a few hours left before our first fundraising deadline of the general election, we wanted to ask for your support of Martin’s re-election campaign.

**[Tonight’s deadline is our chance to show New Mexico’s Democratic strength. Your support right now will help turn out voters and set us up for victory in November.](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/4gA/ni0YAA/t.2i3/-x-FP5pLQpyGNnuHTFG43A/h1/aHO21LnX1DH2iKGsTPn3bYhi39zkK-2F5KLSrcx61KPVGHIQ47KEFIp4jQohIWFmMXxa9HmWw2IQfn9WhyYqcF2bsM3RhErrfuJkSBcGuWe905WGn7o5OUxb2gWmnEc2cgnUtHzwoV3-2BAQc3gX-2FK5BJYw-2Fg9nVqqyZJ59wUb-2FNen4-2Bpn9Rwakt5jaERaHQCn55oZ-2FPnjFzP1d4RPG8AnBEyFPMYEQbmuSn8zP4Qov2kp1-2BhBKxw-2BhGIB2DlGfkxRfOL8LCvUcRAP5nW5L-2Br70Mg-2Fiys-2BaqrtaGJgAjJPp3neZyQIp4Y4XHof9s9lx3IAoYNBenrOcc4k29-2FwWcX6uL8Q-3D-3D)**

At the end of this month, we will publicly report our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission (FEC). These numbers will be used as a gauge of Martin’s strength against his two opponents.

In the meantime, Martin is doing everything he can to earn the support of New Mexicans. While it seems like White House lies, corruption, and scandals plague the news and social media, Martin is making real progress in the Senate.

Last month, he led the fight on net neutrality, securing a major Democratic victory in the Senate.

Martin introduced legislation to protect public lands, while the Trump administration only wants to shrink those lands.

And Martin introduced a bill to make college more affordable for students nationwide so they don’t have to choose between an education and avoiding massive debt.

These are real victories and progress on our values, and Martin is working every day to keep that progress going.

**[But he needs your help. We need only 117 contributions to hit our donation goal before midnight. Your donation right now can help make all the difference. Will you pitch in and help us reach our first fundraising goal of the general election?](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/4gA/ni0YAA/t.2i3/-x-FP5pLQpyGNnuHTFG43A/h2/aHO21LnX1DH2iKGsTPn3bYhi39zkK-2F5KLSrcx61KPVGHIQ47KEFIp4jQohIWFmMXxa9HmWw2IQfn9WhyYqcF2bsM3RhErrfuJkSBcGuWe905WGn7o5OUxb2gWmnEc2cgnUtHzwoV3-2BAQc3gX-2FK5BJYw-2Fg9nVqqyZJ59wUb-2FNen6a3Mt9orZEr-2BvP7RvSsxPTPFh7DSAyWOLWPfn3Cq15gieZ0J1C98WDwB54oVCrW029QZHpgoARc-2BMNbJFjaVesvcESxljand-2BqNiPx4Btg0m4CtZvB4ecAZBHl2G7fXeQKrRbWzwfjjNRnHWqsszMA7LpyD8YESeVJuIadDpzPtA-3D-3D)**

Thanks for standing with Martin.

Team Heinrich

---
Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate

name: Bob Casey
subject: Hey, I won't back down -- can I count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6693/51dbcc2a/7e0cab8/3a2c076/3596556224/VEsH/ "http://www.bobcasey.com/")
Hello,

There are only five months left until November's crucial election -- and we need you on our team, because these months will be tough.

The GOP has stepped up their attacks against me since we won the primary, and they're showing no signs of stopping anytime soon. Just last month, President Trump attacked my decision to fight for working families by voting against his tax scheme, which gives the vast majority of benefits to corporations and the 1%.

I stand by my record of hard work for Pennsylvania families, and I won't back down from this fight -- I hope you won't, either. A Democratic Senate majority is in reach: it would give us the votes we need to put a stop to President Trumps dangerous anti-middle-class agenda, but first we need to protect this seat in November.

**I'm counting on you to help us win. We can't do it without supporters like you, so it would be invaluable if you could make a $5 investment in taking back the Senate today.**

Here's the link: **[secure.bobcasey.com/donate](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6693/51dbcc2a/7e0cab8/3a2c077/3596556224/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYm9iLWNhc2V5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbV8yMDE4MDYwNl9mcjJfbmRfZ3BzIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180606_fr2_nd_gps&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

Thanks,

Bob

| Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump Administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6693/51dbcc2a/7e0cab8/3a2c077/3596556224/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYm9iLWNhc2V5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbV8yMDE4MDYwNl9mcjJfbmRfZ3BzIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180606_fr2_nd_gps&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Team Rosen
subject: McConnell just admitted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
This is huge: According to _The Washington Post_ , **Mitch McConnell just admitted that the battle for the Senate majority runs straight through Nevada.**
So this new poll showing us neck and neck with the GOP's rubber stamp, Dean Heller, has us very worried.
Team, we fell short of our fundraising goal last month, and **we absolutely cannot afford to fall short again.**
A Mitch McConnell-linked super PAC has already pledged to funnel millions into winning this race and protecting the Republican Senate majority - and right now we're falling way short of where we need to be. **In a race like this, every single dollar is the difference between winning and losing, so we're counting on you to step up before our midnight deadline.**
**[**Please give $5 or more - whatever you can before midnight - to help us flip Nevada and the Senate blue.**](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd42a/4fbb2af3/7142c7e4/5e8a11c8/1773827279/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azYxNC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk614-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

It all comes down to this race. If we can't hit fundraising goals like this one, we could easily lose our best shot to take back the Senate. **So we need you with us right now - can we count on you to rush $5 or more immediately to stop McConnell and the GOP by flipping Nevada blue and taking back the Senate for Democrats?**

Jacky Rosen is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Nevada - our best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. We're working hard each day to elect her so she can fight for affordable health care, a cleaner environment, better education and more. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates.

Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. 95% of our contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200 - and without that support, Democrats will lose our best opportunity to take back the Senate this November.
